sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112014" key="foitaliw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοιτ-ᾰλιώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Bacchus, <sense id="n112014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the maddener,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
